content.en:
"Eternal treasure!"

The Lord of the Dark Mist is extremely excited and eager in his heart, this is most likely an eternal treasure!

As one of the six legendary lords, he naturally knew very well that the ruins in the space-time territory did not have a real eternal treasure at all, that sword was just a projection of time and space, and the real eternal treasure was not in the space-time territory at all.

He had never encountered a true Eternal Treasure, and at this moment, Yuanhai had finally given birth to an Eternal Treasure.

"Although Yuanhai is relatively young, it also has the potential to give birth to an eternal treasure, I have been waiting for countless years, and I finally waited!"

The Lord of the Mist wants to keep this Eternal Arcana for himself, and does not want to share it with other Legendary Lords.

He has always been guarded by his command in the source sea, so he can arrive at the source sea as soon as possible, as for the other five legendary realm lords, they don't pay much attention to the affairs of the source sea.

However, this Eternal Arcana had not been completely born, it would take some time, and it would be very difficult and long to retrieve the Eternal Arcana, and he would not be able to hide it from the other five Legendary Realm Lords.

"Blocking this area, those half-step Eternal Realms in the Source Sea have almost no knowledge, and they don't know what an Eternal Treasure is at all. If I occupy this area and don't allow any living beings to come closer, the news won't get out."

The Lord of the Mist thought to himself.

Of course, there is one more thing to deal with in front of us, and that is - the Endless Lord in front of you.

This is an Immortal Realm Lord, and a Lord with a clone, he must be subdued, otherwise the Endless Lord will spread the news, - he can't stop it.

"Endless Lord, you take refuge in me and become the lord of my line, and I will help you attack the Legendary Realm Lord in the future, how about it?"

The Lord of the Mist said.

"Not good!" Ye Tian said indifferently.

It's ridiculous that the Lord of the Mist still wants to subdue him.

"Endless Lord, do you know the gap between us? Although you have a clone, I also have a clone, if I deal with you with all my might, do you think you will be able to escape? And your foundation is the Source Sea and the Flesh and Bone Territory, you also have a sub-race, called the Terran, if you offend me, you should know the consequences!"

Although he knew that threatening Ye Tian would make Ye Tian very angry, even if he reluctantly agreed, it would be a hidden danger in the future.

However, he didn't care so much, he didn't want the news of the birth of the Eternal Treasure here to be publicized, he needed to delay the time, and the longer the time was delayed, the greater the hope he had of seizing this Eternal Treasure.

In the future, if he is in charge of an eternal treasure, he will be an invincible existence in the entire Source Sea and the space-time territory.

When the time comes, even if he offends all the eternal realms, he has nothing to fear.

"You threaten me?"

Ye Tian looked at the Dark Mist Lord indifferently, the aura on his body became cold and condensed, wisps of killing intent boiled into the void, and his will burst out, making the void begin to shatter.

"Fourth-Order Will!"

The Lord of the Dark Mist was a little surprised.

Only the Legendary Realm Lord has a fourth-order will, and Ye Tian has not yet reached the Legendary Realm Lord, so he actually has a fourth-order will in advance, this difficulty is very huge!

But even so, the Dark Mist Lord didn't take Ye Tian seriously.

No matter how powerful the Immortal Realm Lord is, he is far from being the opponent of the Legendary Realm Lord.

"Endless Lord, ask you again, do you want to take refuge in me?"

The Lord of the Mist pressed.

"Get out!

Ye Tian didn't want to talk nonsense, and directly said coldly

Rumble!!!

The aura of the Dark Mist Lord erupted, and hundreds of millions of territories collapsed, and at this moment he really wanted to kill Ye Tian

However, he couldn't help it.

If he really did it, he would definitely be on the opposite side of Ye Tian, and I am afraid that the news here would not be hidden.

In an instant, the Dark Mist Lord's aura converged, and the whole person became gentle, saying, "Endless Lord, you are the lord of the peak of the Immortal Realm, and it is very normal that you are unwilling to join my faction. But the fate here belongs to me, as long as you make an oath of will and heart, do not divulge the news here, and do not allow people to come near here, I will not attack you, otherwise you and I will be mortal enemies. "

Ye Tian sneered: "Dark Mist Lord, you want to monopolize the Eternal Treasure here, and you don't want the other five Legendary Realm Lords to know, but you are too underestimated by me, right? Let me tell you, this Eternal Treasure belongs to me, so you should get out of the way." "

Tear your face!

The Dark Mist Lord could no longer bear the anger in his heart, and if he was another Immortal Realm Lord in the Space-Time Territory, which one dared to talk to him like this, and which one was not respectful?

"Endless Lord, your clone is dead, and I will even hunt down your other clones until I kill you completely!"

As soon as the words fell, the Lord of the Dark Mist made a move.

"Three thousand dark mist shadow bodies!"

Dark shadows emerged one after another, all around.

In an instant, all of these gray and dark shadows attacked Ye Tian, and the strength of each gray and dark shadow was comparable to that of a top nine-step immortal realm lord.

If it was an ordinary nine-step Immortal Realm Lord, I was afraid that it would soon be bombarded by the Dark Mist Lord.

Facing a Legendary Realm Lord, Ye Tian would not underestimate the other party.

Nothingness and Truth!

Will Wall Light!

These two Legendary Eternal Techniques have now been perfected by Ye Tian to the point of top-notch Legendary Eternal Techniques, and their power is very powerful.

Bang bang bang!!

The attacks of the three thousand dark mist shadow bodies were blocked by Ye Tian's will wall light, and they couldn't hurt Ye Tian at all.

The next moment.

Ye Tian unleashed the legendary eternal technique of the Hundred Million Void, and the Billions of Voids were superimposed to suppress the Dark Mist Lord.

Bang!!!!

The Dark Mist Lord's face changed, obviously affected by the Hundred Million Void, and his body began to tremble.

Layers of void were compressed into layers, and pieces of territory were compressed into small pieces to suppress the Lord of the Dark Mist.

However, the strength of the Dark Mist Lord was still very strong, and he forcibly tore through the suppression of countless voids, and large swaths of the void shattered into nothingness.

Bang!!!!!

The two sides kept colliding and fighting, but on the whole, Ye Tian still fell into the disadvantage.

If it weren't for the Void True Body, Ye Tian's regular state would not be able to defeat the Dark Mist Lord at all.

"You actually have the power of a Voidmon, how did you do that?"

The Lord of the Mist asked, confused.

But Ye Tian wouldn't answer him.

The Dark Mist Lord took out the top-notch Void Saint Soldier against the Void Beast, but under the repeated slashes of Ye Tian's Will Slashing Void Sword, the Void Saint Soldier gradually shattered.

0................

From beginning to end, Ye Tian still did not urge the Eternal Supreme Treasure Mixed Yuan Order.

But for a long time, he had to use it.

Airplanes!!!!!

Another doppelganger of the Dark Mist Lord appeared in the Source Sea and went directly to the Dark Forbidden Domain, which completely angered Ye Tian.

The Lord of the Dark Mist has a total of two clones, and the main body is three combat powers.

Now, in addition to the main body, the two clones of the Dark Mist Lord have been dispatched, and they also want to attack the Dark Forbidden Domain, which shows that they really want to fight Ye Tian endlessly.

Just as the second doppelganger of the Dark Mist Lord was about to descend on the Dark Forbidden Domain, a copy of Ye Tian's body intercepted the Dark Mist Lord.

When the Dark Mist Lord saw Ye Tian's other body, he thought it was Ye Tian's body, so he didn't care.

But soon, he was dumbfounded.

Rushing!!

Two replica bodies appeared, and at this moment, Ye Tian had already dispatched three major body combat powers.

What's more, one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies directly triggered the Hybrid Yuan Order.

Airplanes!

The Eternal Hybrid Realm enveloped a copy of the Darkmist Lord's body, and cast a hundred million voids.

With the help of the Mixed Yuan Order, the Billion Heavy Void has been integrated into the three major powers, reaching the power of the half-step Legendary Eternal Technique.

Click!!!

The Dark Mist Lord's three thousand Dark Mist Shadow Bodies shattered one after another, and this legendary eternal technique could not be maintained at all.

Then, Ye Tian's Will Extreme Dao Fist bombarded the Dark Mist Lord's body with a single punch, directly punching it into the depths of time and space, shattering hundreds of millions of time and space, and the Dark Mist Lord's body also began to crack, this punch really hurt him.

However, it was still a little difficult for Ye Tian to kill the Dark Mist Lord.

The other side.

Ye Tian sent two more replica bodies to the Darkmist Lord, and he wanted to let the Darkmist Lord know the consequences of offending him. _
